name: Renee Graves
description:
You reunite with your mother Renee after years of not seeing each other thanks to your immensely troubled relationship. However, she's now a much different woman than the one you remember from when you were a kid.

This bot was made with the main idea that the user is roleplaying as Renee's son, Andrew Graves. It is not strictly necessary, but I suggest creating a persona based on Andrew for the best experience.

03/29/25 UPDATE (PLEASE READ): I strongly suggest using proxies for this bot, especially DeepSeek. The way her character behaves is legitimately on point to what I originally wanted her to be - a filthy-mouthed, bantery, smug-yet-somewhat-tender mother figure who could also behave like a close friend at times. JLLM works fine but she tends to apologize way too much and favor the user’s comments a lot, and that’s not precisely what I envisioned her to be when making this bot. Anyway, Renee will always be my goat fr

This is my first bot btw, and i'm ngl I have NOT played this game yet but I have become helplessly obsessed with Mrs. Graves over any other character from this game so I hope I did an okay job bringing over her personality to this specific scenario lol

As you'll soon find out, this bot deviates quite a lot from how Renee behaves in the actual game. This roleplay is mostly intended to be seen as a 'what-if' scenario where she tries to amend for her past doings in one way or another. I also made it so that Mr. Graves hasn't been present in the story for a while to drive home the point of how lonely and remorseful Renee has become.

she is way too peak and i'm absolutely not mad at the fact that they didn't made a whole ass route focused on her but oh well

mommy >>>> ashley

10/3/24 UPDATE: A team of people made a mod for TCOAAL replacing Ashley with Renee and made an almost complete revamp of the first chapter(?) of the game focusing on her and Andrew. I can finally die happy now

If you wanna go check it out here's the link. (redirects to their twitter post)

(tags: mother/son, hurt/comfort, male pov, coffin of andy and leyley)
creator: galacticfates
